generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR providing raw point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawPointCloudTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance DeepsenseDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera delivering depth images."
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance MotorSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor encoded in the motor controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor providing instantaneous steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationModule : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuation module converting desired speed into motor voltage."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance SteeringServoActuation : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuation via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller and servo."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance RawPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DeepsenseDepthCamera
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance EgoSpeedTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSpeedSensor
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

instance SteeringAngleTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinInstance
]

// C4: Data instances
instance PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data acquired from Hokuyo UST‑10LX LiDAR."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data acquired from Intel Deepsense D435i."
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance EgoSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time ego speed measured by the motor controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo ACCComputationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time steering angle measurement."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo ACCComputationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracks of detected objects generated by Kalman filter."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataMonitoringFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance PointCloudClusterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud clusters produced by DBSCAN clustering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawPointCloudTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataMonitoringFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Desired speed computed by the ACC controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedTransmitted
    DTDFvocab:inputTo ACCComputationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated vehicle state and object tracks reports stored in SQL."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataMonitoringFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance VisualizationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Visualization data for 3‑D rendering of vehicle, environment, projected path, and tracks."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo VisualizationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering module applied to point cloud data."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance KalmanTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter based object tracking applied to clustered point clouds."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC controller implementing ISO 15622 standard for performance class I ACC."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo ACCComputationFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ReportingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reporting model aggregating vehicle state and object tracks into a SQL database."
    DTDFvocab:inputTo DataMonitoringFE
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles unit conversions and message alignment using ROS2 nodes over Wi‑Fi."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataProcessingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ACCComputationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Executes the ACC algorithm and generates desired speed."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RemoteManagementFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Allows operators to enable/disable ACC, change desired speed, and issue emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3‑D rendering of vehicle, environment, projected path, and tracks via a 3‑D visualization FE."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DataMonitoringFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects vehicle state and object tracks and aggregates them into reports."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

// C6: Services
instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing data processing: DBSCAN clustering and Kalman tracking."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackingInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing desired speed and sending results back to the vehicle over Wi‑Fi."
    DTDFVocab:provides SendDesiredSpeedAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service processing UI commands to control ACC and handle emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction
    DTDFVocab:provides ChangeDesiredSpeedAction
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakeAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing 3‑D visualization of the vehicle and environment."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering real‑time display, saving, and report generation of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides DownloadReportAction
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human‑readable time‑series report of vehicle state and object tracks."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3‑D visualization insight of vehicle, projected path, and object tracks."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight derived from Kalman filter based object tracking."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance SendDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to send computed desired speed back to the vehicle."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable the ACC system."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance ChangeDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to change the desired speed via UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger an emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

instance DownloadReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to download the generated report."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinInstance
]

// DigitalTwin and PhysicalTwin instances
instance DigitalTwinInstance : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Remote server instance hosting the digital twin."
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, ACCComputationFE, VisualizationFE, DataMonitoringFE, RemoteManagementFE
]

instance PhysicalTwinInstance : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Physical twin instance on the vehicle."
    base:contains MotorActuationModule, SteeringServoActuation, HokuyoLiDAR, DeepsenseDepthCamera, MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C18: Environment
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuationModule, SteeringServoActuation, HokuyoLiDAR, DeepsenseDepthCamera, MotorSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataTranslationFE, ACCComputationFE, VisualizationFE, DataMonitoringFE
]

instance UserInterfaceEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RemoteManagementFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The ACC Controlling FE computes a desired speed based on lead vehicle detection and sends this command to the vehicle over Wi‑Fi; the Physical Twin Entity’s Actuation FE converts the desired speed into motor voltage commands to drive the ESC and steering servo. Remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, emergency braking) are entered in the User Interface FE (3D Visualization and Control Panel), routed to the DT, and transmitted to the vehicle as control signals via Wi‑Fi."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system operates in real‑time with mandatory end‑to‑end latency no greater than 100 ms from vehicle to Digital Twin (Requirement R7), and clock synchronization accuracy within 100 ms (Requirement R8). Data acquisition and ACC computation are performed at each perception cycle (typically at ~10 Hz, though the exact frequency is not specified)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated by mapping each ISO 23247 functional entity to a ROS 2 package: the Data Collection FE, Data Translation FE, Actuation FE, ACC FE, User Interface FE, Visualization FE, etc. These packages communicate over ROS 2 topics, while cross‑entity messaging (PT↔DT) is performed over Wi‑Fi using the Data Translation FE. The overall system is distributed across the vehicle, a remote server, and the operator workstation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (definition of architectural RA, mapping of software components to ISO 23247 FEs), Manufacture (retrofitting of the 1/10‑scale vehicle with Jetson hardware and sensors), Operation (runtime execution of DT services, real‑time data flow and remote command handling). The Digital Twin covers the ‘operated’ representation of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation enforces a strict 100 ms latency ceiling (R7) and 100 ms clock‑synchronization tolerance (R8), ensuring data integrity for safety‑critical ACC decisions. Verification is implicit in adherence to ISO 23247 and ISO 15622, with the Data Translation FE guaranteeing unit consistency and the SQL database providing persistent records for post‑mortem validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical twin and digital twin communicate over a Wi‑Fi network; ROS 2 topics exchange ROS messages between internal components on the vehicle, while inter‑entity messages (e.g., desired speed command) are serialized by the Data Translation FE and transmitted over UDP/TCP (not explicitly specified). The Data Translation FE uses standard ROS serialization mechanisms and unit conversion routines."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed on a remote edge/cloud server, while the Physical Twin Entity resides on the vehicle’s NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. The User Entity operates on a separate workstation or operator terminal. The overall deployment is thus a multi‑node distributed architecture bridging on‑board compute and cloud resources."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture for digital twin design, ISO 15622 specification for ACC control, ROS 2 middleware, NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK, optionally OPC UA for data translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system is safety‑critical, with strict latency and clock‑synchronization requirements defined by ISO 15622 and ISO 23247. All vehicle‑to‑DT communication occurs over Wi‑Fi and must satisfy secure transmission protocols, though the specific encryption or authentication mechanisms are not detailed in the document. The design adheres to safety standards, but explicit cybersecurity measures are beyond the scope of the provided text."
]
